column3: You need the Beacon Badge to fight her.
She's at the northest point of the city. Next to Julia's house.
can be fought alone or with Swimmer Colton [186] in a double battle
if fought in a double battle her team will be on the left side of battle
can be fought alone or with Swimmer Paige [191] in a double battle
if fought in a double battle his team will be on the right side of battle
(SWIMS LEFT, LOOKS AROUND CLOCKWISE, SWIMS RIGHT, LOOKS AROUND CLOCKWISE, REPEAT)
The item on the left behind him is an Ultra Ball
The item above her in the shallow waters is a Dive Ball
The item in the shallow water above her is a Rare Candy
(SWIMS BACK AND FORTH IN AN INVERTED L SHAPE)
You'll need to go left and down after Swimmer Cassandra [193] to find him
You can find him at the bottom left corner of the room after jumping one of the ledges or climbing down and walking left right after entering
Above him are the TM68s Giga Impact
There is a Max Repel above her past the bridge
There is a Pokemon Center Nurse standing right past her to heal you.

There is a Calcium below them and a Rare Candy far after them.

He is standing next to a waterfall. Follow it to get to a Dragon Scale
Ignore the stairs and continue left to find a Razor Claw
you'll need to explore the eastern part of the cave and reach the end of Route 224 before getting to the Pokemon League

She's in the trees on the left side of the route. Beat her and Psychic Maxwell [288] to gain access to a PP Max, a hidden Ultra Ball and some Sitrus, Nahab, Wepear and Bluk Berry plants but you won't be able to progress to the end of the route through here
